approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation execution: keep going card-by-card, park unsafe blockers, and continue safe work.
notes: Approved as the next safe card after KPI-LEAD-VALIDATION-001. Scope is read-only Strategic Intelligence proof enrichment: expose thread completeness, reply-backed context, direction, latest activity, source account, evidence use, corroboration, and weak-proof flags.
